channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Iran War: What a Marine Expeditionary Unit is – and other US military terms
item.description: The US has deployed thousands of additional Marines and airborne troops to the Middle East since the Iran war began.

item.title: Iran denies Trump’s claim Iranian president requested ceasefire
item.description: Donald Trump says US will continue 'blasting Iran into oblivion' until Strait of Hormuz is reopened.

item.title: Can Russia help fill the global energy gap?
item.description: Higher crude prices due to the disruption in the Strait of Hormuz have helped Russia earn more from energy exports.

item.title: French President Macron visits Japan to discuss the energy crisis
item.description: France's Macron paid a visit to Tokyo to meet with Japan's Takaichi to discuss the economic war of the war on Iran.

item.title: Russia imposing ban on all gasoline exports due to Iran war
item.description: Russia imposing ban on all gasoline exports due to Iran war

item.title: ‘Permanent scar’: Iran minister on US-Israeli attacks on monuments
item.description: Iran’s cultural heritage minister tells Al Jazeera damage to 56 sites is a ‘deliberate war' on the country's identity.

item.title: How are NATO allies pushing back against Trump’s Iran war demands?
item.description: Trump says he is considering a NATO exit as allies resist cooperation in US-Israel war on Iran.

item.title: UK PM says war on Iran will impact Britain’s future
item.description: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer says the war on Iran will shape Britain’s future.

item.title: West Bank strikes over Palestinian-only death penalty
item.description: Palestinians in the occupied West Bank went on a general strike after Israel passed a death penalty law.

item.title: ‘US attacking Iran’s nuclear facilities is a sign of endgame’
item.description: ‘US attacking Iran’s nuclear facilities is a sign of endgame’
